creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Thibault Payet from comment #0)
> Since we now have NVIDIA drivers that support Vulkan, and that intel gpu
> support it too (Don't know for amd but I guess that they support it). Is
> there a reason for not having both VULKAN and VKD3D enabled by default ?

Yes, it's always a tradeoff which options to enable by default and how
much we want a port to pull in. Imagine a user who wants to run a basic
app under Wine and finds themselves pull in more and more other stuff
they do not need.

That said, I see your point and we can give it a try for
emulators/wine-devel for now, which I plan on doing based on your
suggestion.
